briefdescription.para: catalog.c: set of generic Catalog related routines

detaileddescription.para: Reference: SGML Open Technical Resolution TR9401:1997. http://www.jclark.com/sp/catalog.htm
XML Catalogs Working Draft 06 August 2001 http://www.oasis-open.org/committees/entity/spec-2001-08-06.html
See Copyright for the status of this software.
Author: Daniel Veillard

briefdescription.para: Normalizes the Public Identifier.

detaileddescription.para: Implements 6.2. Public Identifier Normalization from http://www.oasis-open.org/committees/entity/spec-2001-08-06.html

simplesect.para: the new string or NULL, the string must be deallocated by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Load the catalog and expand the existing catal structure.

detaileddescription.para: This can be either an XML Catalog or an SGML Catalog

parameterdescription.para: the current depth of the catalog

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Handle an out of memory condition.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlCatalogEntryPtr catal, xmlNodePtr node, int error, const char *msg, const xmlChar *str1, const xmlChar *str2, const xmlChar *str3)
memberdef.name: xmlCatalogErr

briefdescription.para: Handle a catalog error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlCatalogEntryType type, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *value, const xmlChar *URL, xmlCatalogPrefer prefer, xmlCatalogEntryPtr group)
memberdef.name: xmlNewCatalogEntry

briefdescription.para: create a new Catalog entry, this type is shared both by XML and SGML catalogs, but the acceptable types values differs.

parameterdescription.para: the PUBLIC vs. SYSTEM current preference value
for members of a group, the group entry

simplesect.para: the xmlCatalogEntry or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free the memory allocated to a full chained list of Catalog entries.
Free the memory allocated to a Catalog entry.
Free the memory allocated to list of Catalog entries from the catalog file hash.
create a new Catalog, this type is shared both by XML and SGML catalogs, but the acceptable types values differs.

parameterdescription.para: the PUBLIC vs. SYSTEM current preference value

simplesect.para: the xmlCatalog or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free the memory allocated to a Catalog.
Serialize an SGML Catalog entry.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlCatalogEntryPtr catal, xmlNodePtr catalog, xmlDocPtr doc, xmlNsPtr ns, xmlCatalogEntryPtr cgroup)
memberdef.name: xmlDumpXMLCatalogNode

briefdescription.para: Serializes a Catalog entry, called by xmlDumpXMLCatalog and recursively for group entries.
Convert one entry from the catalog.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to the catalog being converted

briefdescription.para: Convert all the SGML catalog entries as XML ones.

simplesect.para: the number of entries converted if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Expand the URN into the equivalent Public Identifier.

simplesect.para: the new identifier or NULL, the string must be deallocated by the caller.

briefdescription.para: parse an XML file and build a tree.

detaileddescription.para: It's like xmlParseFile except it bypass all catalog lookups.

simplesect.para: the resulting document tree or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Load a file content into memory.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the 0 terminated string or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Parses the catalog file to extract the XML tree and then analyze the tree to build a list of Catalog entries corresponding to this catalog.

parameterdescription.para: the PUBLIC vs. SYSTEM current preference value

simplesect.para: the resulting Catalog entries list

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlNodePtr cur, xmlCatalogPrefer prefer, xmlCatalogEntryPtr parent, xmlCatalogEntryPtr cgroup)
memberdef.name: xmlParseXMLCatalogNodeList

briefdescription.para: Examines a list of XML sibling nodes of a catalog and build a list of Catalog entry from it adding it to the parent.

detaileddescription.para: The examination will recurse to examine node subtrees.

parameterdescription.para: the XML node list of siblings
the PUBLIC vs. SYSTEM current preference value
the group which includes this list

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an External Identifier for a list of catalogs.

detaileddescription.para: Implements (or tries to) 7.1. External Identifier Resolution from http://www.oasis-open.org/committees/entity/spec-2001-08-06.html

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an URI for a list of catalogs.

detaileddescription.para: Implements (or tries to) 7.2. URI Resolution from http://www.oasis-open.org/committees/entity/spec-2001-08-06.html

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found

briefdescription.para: lookup the internal type associated to an XML catalog entry name

simplesect.para: the type associated with that name

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlNodePtr cur, xmlCatalogEntryType type, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *attrName, const xmlChar *uriAttrName, xmlCatalogPrefer prefer, xmlCatalogEntryPtr cgroup)
memberdef.name: xmlParseXMLCatalogOneNode

briefdescription.para: Finishes the examination of an XML tree node of a catalog and build a Catalog entry from it.

parameterdescription.para: the PUBLIC vs. SYSTEM current preference value
the group which includes this node

simplesect.para: the new Catalog entry node or NULL in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlNodePtr cur, xmlCatalogPrefer prefer, xmlCatalogEntryPtr parent, xmlCatalogEntryPtr cgroup)
memberdef.name: xmlParseXMLCatalogNode

briefdescription.para: Examines an XML tree node of a catalog and build a Catalog entry from it adding it to its parent.

detaileddescription.para: The examination can be recursive.

parameterdescription.para: the PUBLIC vs. SYSTEM current preference value
the group which includes this node

briefdescription.para: Fetch and parse the subcatalog referenced by an entry.

parameterdescription.para: an existing but incomplete catalog entry

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlCatalogEntryPtr catal, const xmlChar *type, const xmlChar *orig, const xmlChar *replace)
memberdef.name: xmlAddXMLCatalog

briefdescription.para: Add an entry in the XML catalog, it may overwrite existing but different entries.

parameterdescription.para: the type of record to add to the catalog
the system, public or prefix to match (or NULL)
the replacement value for the match

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Remove entries in the XML catalog where the value or the URI is equal to value

parameterdescription.para: the value to remove from the catalog

simplesect.para: the number of entries removed if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an External Identifier for a list of catalog entries.

detaileddescription.para: Implements (or tries to) 7.1. External Identifier Resolution from http://www.oasis-open.org/committees/entity/spec-2001-08-06.html

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an External Identifier for a list of catalog entries.

detaileddescription.para: Implements (or tries to) 7.2.2. URI Resolution from http://www.oasis-open.org/committees/entity/spec-2001-08-06.html

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found

briefdescription.para: Skip a comment in an SGML catalog.

simplesect.para: new current character

briefdescription.para: Parse an SGML catalog ID.

simplesect.para: new current character and store the value in id

briefdescription.para: Parse an SGML catalog name.

simplesect.para: new current character and store the value in name

briefdescription.para: Get the Catalog entry type for a given SGML Catalog name.

simplesect.para: Catalog entry type

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlCatalogPtr catal, const xmlChar *value, const char *file, int super, int depth)
memberdef.name: xmlParseSGMLCatalog

briefdescription.para: Parse an SGML catalog content and fill up the catal hash table with the new entries found.

parameterdescription.para: the content of the SGML Catalog serialization
should this be handled as a Super Catalog in which case parsing is not recursive
the current depth of the catalog

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog local reference associated to a public ID.

simplesect.para: the local resource if found or NULL otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog local reference for a system ID.

simplesect.para: the local resource if found or NULL otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an External Identifier.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found

briefdescription.para: Load an SGML super catalog.

detaileddescription.para: It won't expand CATALOG or DELEGATE references. This is only needed for manipulating SGML Super Catalogs like adding and removing CATALOG or DELEGATE entries.

simplesect.para: the catalog parsed or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Load the catalog and build the associated data structures.

detaileddescription.para: This can be either an XML Catalog or an SGML Catalog It will recurse in SGML CATALOG entries. On the other hand XML Catalogs are not handled recursively.

simplesect.para: the catalog parsed or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog resource for a system ID.

simplesect.para: the resource if found or NULL otherwise, the value returned must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog local reference associated to a public ID in that catalog.

simplesect.para: the local resource if found or NULL otherwise, the value returned must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an External Identifier.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an URI.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Dump the given catalog to the given file.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlCatalog *catal, const xmlChar *type, const xmlChar *orig, const xmlChar *replace)
memberdef.name: xmlACatalogAdd

briefdescription.para: Add an entry in the catalog, it may overwrite existing but different entries.

parameterdescription.para: the type of record to add to the catalog
the system, public or prefix to match
the replacement value for the match

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Remove an entry from the catalog.

simplesect.para: the number of entries removed if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: create a new Catalog.

parameterdescription.para: should this create an SGML catalog

simplesect.para: the xmlCatalog or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Check is a catalog is empty.

parameterdescription.para: should this create an SGML catalog

simplesect.para: 1 if the catalog is empty, 0 if not, amd -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Do the catalog initialization only of global data, doesn't try to load any catalog actually.
Load the default system catalog.
Load the catalog and makes its definitions effective for the default external entity loader.

detaileddescription.para: It will recurse in SGML CATALOG entries. this function is not thread safe, catalog initialization should preferably be done once at startup

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Load the catalogs and makes their definitions effective for the default external entity loader.

detaileddescription.para: this function is not thread safe, catalog initialization should preferably be done once at startup

parameterdescription.para: a list of directories separated by a colon or a space.

briefdescription.para: Free up all the memory associated with catalogs.
Free global data.
Try to lookup the catalog resource for a system ID.

simplesect.para: the resource if found or NULL otherwise, the value returned must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog reference associated to a public ID.

simplesect.para: the resource if found or NULL otherwise, the value returned must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an External Identifier.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an URI.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Dump all the global catalog content to the given file.
Dump all the global catalog content as a xmlDoc This function is just for testing/debugging purposes.

simplesect.para: The catalog as xmlDoc or NULL if failed, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Add an entry in the catalog, it may overwrite existing but different entries.

detaileddescription.para: If called before any other catalog routine, allows to override the default shared catalog put in place by xmlInitializeCatalog;

parameterdescription.para: the type of record to add to the catalog
the system, public or prefix to match
the replacement value for the match

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Remove an entry from the catalog.

simplesect.para: the number of entries removed if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Convert all the SGML catalog entries as XML ones.

simplesect.para: the number of entries converted if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Used to get the user preference w.r.t.

detaileddescription.para: to what catalogs should be accepted

simplesect.para: the current xmlCatalogAllow value

briefdescription.para: Used to set the user preference w.r.t.

detaileddescription.para: to what catalogs should be accepted

briefdescription.para: Allows to set the preference between public and system for deletion in XML Catalog resolution.

detaileddescription.para: C.f. section 4.1.1 of the spec Values accepted are XML_CATA_PREFER_PUBLIC or XML_CATA_PREFER_SYSTEM

xrefdescription.para: This setting is global and not thread-safe.

simplesect.para: the previous value of the default preference for delegation

briefdescription.para: Used to set the debug level for catalog operation, 0 disable debugging, 1 enable it.

parameterdescription.para: the debug level of catalogs required

simplesect.para: the previous value of the catalog debugging level

briefdescription.para: Free up the memory associated to the catalog list.
Add the new entry to the catalog list.

parameterdescription.para: the URL to a new local catalog

simplesect.para: the updated list

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an External Identifier using a document's private catalog list.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an URI using a document's private catalog list.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog reference associated to a system ID.

simplesect.para: the resource if found or NULL otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog reference associated to a public ID.

simplesect.para: the resource if found or NULL otherwise.
